message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor AntFacadeController
participant "Soldat" as Soldat
participant "Ouvriere" as Ouvriere
participant "Fourmi" as Fourmi
participant "Noeud" as Noeud
participant "Fourmilière" as Fourmilière
participant "Grille" as Grille
participant "Random" as Random

AntFacadeController -> AntFacadeController: 1 play
loop Fourmilière f in listeFourmilières
    loop Fourmi f in listeFourmis
        alt Fourmi instanceof Soldat
            AntFacadeController -> Soldat: 2 deplacer(Random)
            activate Soldat
            Soldat -> Grille: 3 noeudsLibres
            activate Grille
            Grille --> Soldat: 4 ArrayList<Noeud>
            deactivate Grille
            Soldat -> Random: 5 nextInt()
            activate Random
            Random --> Soldat: 6 int
            deactivate Random
            Soldat -> Fourmi: 7 setPosition:Noeud
            activate Fourmi
            Fourmi --> Soldat: 8 void
            deactivate Fourmi
            deactivate Soldat
            Soldat --> AntFacadeController: 9 void
        else Fourmi instanceof Ouvriere
            AntFacadeController -> Ouvriere: 10 deplacer(Random)
            activate Ouvriere
            Ouvriere -> Grille: 11 noeudsLibres
            activate Grille
            Grille --> Ouvriere: 12 ArrayList<Noeud>
            deactivate Grille
            Ouvriere -> Fourmi: 13 getNourriture()
            activate Fourmi
            Fourmi --> Ouvriere: 14 nourriture
            deactivate Fourmi
            Ouvriere -> Fourmi: 15 getPheromones()
            activate Fourmi
            Fourmi --> Ouvriere: 16 pheromones
            deactivate Fourmi
            Ouvriere -> Random: 17 nextInt()
            activate Random
            Random --> Ouvriere: 18 int
            deactivate Random
            Ouvriere -> Fourmi: 19 setPosition:Noeud
            activate Fourmi
            Fourmi --> Ouvriere: 20 void
            deactivate Fourmi
            Ouvriere -> Fourmi: 21 getNourriture
            activate Fourmi
            Fourmi --> Ouvriere: 22 nourriture
            deactivate Fourmi
            Ouvriere -> Fourmi: 23 setNourriture(int)
            activate Fourmi
            Fourmi --> Ouvriere: 24 void
            deactivate Fourmi
            else transporte nourriture
            Ouvriere -> Fourmi: 25 ajouterPheromones(int)
            activate Fourmi
            Fourmi --> Ouvriere: 26 void
            deactivate Fourmi
        end
        deactivate Ouvriere
        Ouvriere --> AntFacadeController: 27 void
    end
    loop Noeud n in Grille
        AntFacadeController -> Fourmi: 28 evaporer(int)
        activate Fourmi
        Fourmi --> AntFacadeController: 29 void
        deactivate Fourmi
    end
end
AntFacadeController --> AntFacadeController: 30 void
@enduml
```
